title: Heart Lantern
description: Heart Lantern Grants Health Regeneration To Nearby Players!
body: ![Heart Lantern Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28fa588725adb28faa647a91bdf66882d4941345.png) ## Brighten your survival journey with Heart Lanterns! Glowing lights that heal nearby players! - **Features:** - Heart Lantern is a glowing light source that grants Health Regeneration to nearby players. - Regeneration buff applies within 26 blocks radius/distance. - Configurable. - Supported Languages: English, Chinese. ![Gap 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c046053e5627e992b17170824eef61ce12ef5d9.png) ☕I will appreciate any amount of donation support to keep my modding work ongoing!☕ ![Gap 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c046053e5627e992b17170824eef61ce12ef5d9.png) ## Recent Updates & Changes: - **v1.4** - New config file (Old config won't work anymore) - Released for 1.21.4
